refined_goal.description: Precise statement of what the task should achieve

tension.description: The competing concerns, e.g. 'readability vs. performance'

resolution.description: Which side wins AND WHY — the organizational reason, not just preference

reversible.description: Whether this tradeoff resolution can be changed later without major rework

tradeoffs.description: Every non-trivial task has at least one tradeoff. Make them explicit.

category.description: Decision domain, e.g. file_changes, architecture, dependencies, breaking_changes

autonomous.description: What the agent can decide alone within this category

escalate.description: What requires human review within this category

decision_boundaries.description: For each decision category, define what can be autonomous vs. what needs human sign-off.

beats.description: Which lower-priority goal this overrides when they conflict

because.description: The reason this goal takes priority

priority_order.description: Ranked goals with explicit conflict resolution. Each entry explains WHY it outranks what it beats.
